response.overview: After 37 years behind bars, the real Marlo is finally ready to speak. This documentary reveals the real man behind one of the most iconic crime characters ever, exposing the untold story behind the name made famous by The Wire-and uncovering a complex life shaped by power, loyalty, and survival that challenges everything we thought we knew.
response.tagline: The name became legend. The truth was never told.
response.title: Marlo
